Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec.EconomicAssumptions

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.EconomicAssumptions
Enclosing class:
ProcessResearchSpec
public static class ProcessResearchSpec.EconomicAssumptions extends Object
Economic and emissions assumptions for synthesis ranking.
